hand.name: Scout
hand.ability: When bought, look at the top Insider Tip card.

hand.name: Inside Track
hand.description: Look at the top 2 Insider Tip cards and return them in any order

hand.name: The Squeeze
hand.description: Raise one stock by +2 OR lower one stock by -2

hand.name: Boom
hand.ability: When bought, Purple rises an extra +1 (Purple rises +2 total).

hand.name: Hostile Takeover
hand.description: Look at another player's hand and take 1 stock of your choice. They receive $6 from the bank

reward.text: Draw 3 cards from the main deck, keep 1, return the others to the bottom

hand.name: Informant
hand.ability: When sold, look at the top Insider Tip card.

hand.name: Wild Speculation
hand.description: Reveal the top main-deck card and put it on the bottom; if it is a colored stock, raise or lower that color by 3 (your choice). If it has no color, reveal again

hand.name: Wiretap
hand.description: Look at the top 2 Insider Tip cards and return them in any order

hand.name: Tip-Off
hand.ability: When bought, raise a different color of your choice by +1.

hand.name: Pump and Dump
hand.description: Sell 1 stock at double its current price (still a sale: that color falls -1)

reward.text: Set any one stock to exactly $10

hand.name: Wild Share
hand.ability: No cash value and cannot be sold. When claiming a Goal, may count as one stock of any one color, then is discarded.

market.name: Tip-Off
market.ability: When bought, raise a different color of your choice by +1.

market.name: Scout
market.ability: When bought, look at the top Insider Tip card.

mainDeck.name: Wild Share
mainDeck.ability: No cash value and cannot be sold. When claiming a Goal, may count as one stock of any one color, then is discarded.

mainDeck.name: Boom
mainDeck.ability: When bought, Orange rises an extra +1 (Orange rises +2 total).

mainDeck.name: Tip-Off
mainDeck.ability: When bought, raise a different color of your choice by +1.

mainDeck.name: Tipster's Choice
mainDeck.description: Draw 2 cards from the main deck, keep 1, return the other to the bottom

mainDeck.name: Corner the Market
mainDeck.description: Take any one face-up market stock for free (not bought: no price move, no ability)

mainDeck.name: Scout
mainDeck.ability: When bought, look at the top Insider Tip card.

mainDeck.name: Tip-Off
mainDeck.ability: When bought, raise a different color of your choice by +1.

mainDeck.name: Stock Certificate Forgery
mainDeck.description: Claim any one goal using one fewer stock than required

mainDeck.name: Boom
mainDeck.ability: When bought, Blue rises an extra +1 (Blue rises +2 total).

mainDeck.name: Wild Share
mainDeck.ability: No cash value and cannot be sold. When claiming a Goal, may count as one stock of any one color, then is discarded.

mainDeck.name: Informant
mainDeck.ability: When sold, look at the top Insider Tip card.

mainDeck.name: Boom
mainDeck.ability: When bought, Yellow rises an extra +1 (Yellow rises +2 total).

mainDeck.name: Informant
mainDeck.ability: When sold, look at the top Insider Tip card.

mainDeck.name: Preferred Bidder
mainDeck.description: For rest of game, when you tie the winning bid, you win

mainDeck.name: Rumor Mill
mainDeck.description: Adjust every stock by +1 or -1 (choose per stock)

discardPile.name: Scout
discardPile.ability: When bought, look at the top Insider Tip card.

discardPile.name: Wild Share
discardPile.ability: No cash value and cannot be sold. When claiming a Goal, may count as one stock of any one color, then is discarded.

discardPile.name: Informant
discardPile.ability: When sold, look at the top Insider Tip card.

insiderTipDeck.text: Blue stock value is halved (round down)

resolvedInsiderTips.text: Yellow stock value is halved (round down)

log: Game initialized with 3 players: 42 cards in main deck, 5 in market, 5 Insider Tips, 5 goals.

T1 Astor: auctioned stock-15 Orange Scout at initial $4. Bidding: Getty $5, Morgan $6, Astor $7, Getty passed, Morgan passed -> Astor won at $7 (cash 30->23). Orange +1 to 9. Scout peek: Astor saw itip-57 (Orange +4). Market refilled with stock-11.
T1 Astor die roll: 1 -> flipped itip-57 (Orange +4). Tips left: 4.
T2 Getty: auctioned stock-3 Blue blank at initial $4. Bidding: Morgan $5, Astor $6, Getty passed, Morgan passed -> Astor won at $6 (cash 23->17). Blue +1 to 5. Market refilled with action-41.
T2 Getty die roll: 2 -> nothing.
T3 Morgan: auctioned stock-24 Yellow Informant at initial $2. Bidding: Astor $4, Getty $5, Morgan passed, Astor passed -> Getty won at $5 (cash 30->25). Yellow +1 to 5. Market refilled with stock-33.
T3 Morgan die roll: 4 -> nothing.
T4 Astor: SOLD stock-15 Orange Scout for $9 (cash 17->26). Orange 9->8. Astor holds 1 Blue.
T4 Astor die roll: 1 -> flipped itip-53 (Yellow stock value is halved (round down)). Tips left: 3.
T5 Getty: auctioned action-41 Wild Speculation at initial $0. Bidding: Morgan passed, Astor passed -> Getty won at $0. Wild Speculation added to Getty hand. Market refilled with stock-7.
T5 Getty die roll: 3 -> nothing.

T6 Morgan: auctioned stock-7 Blue Scout at initial $5. Bidding: Astor $9, Getty passed, Morgan passed -> Astor won at $9 (cash 26->17). Blue +1 to 6. Scout peek: Astor saw itip-60 (Blue -3 / Orange -3). Market refilled with action-47.
T6 free action: Astor claimed goal-64 (2 Blue), reward Gain $5 (cash 17->22). Goals in play: 4.
T6 Morgan die roll: 3 -> nothing.
T7 Astor: auctioned stock-9 Orange blank at initial $0. Bidding: Getty passed, Morgan passed -> Astor won at $0. Orange +1 to 9. Astor holds 2 Blue + 1 Orange. Market refilled with stock-8.
T7 Astor die roll: 5 -> nothing.
T8 Getty: auctioned action-47 Wiretap at initial $1. Bidding: Morgan passed, Astor passed -> Getty won at $1 (cash 25->24). Wiretap added to Getty hand. Market refilled with stock-10.
T8 Getty die roll: 1 -> flipped itip-60 (Blue -3 / Orange -3). Tips left: 2.
T9 Morgan: auctioned stock-8 Blue Informant at initial $2. Bidding: Astor passed, Getty passed -> Morgan won at $2 (cash 30->28). Blue +1 to 4. Market refilled with stock-22.
T9 Morgan die roll: 5 -> nothing.
T10 Astor: auctioned stock-35 Wild Share at initial $0. Bidding: Getty passed, Morgan passed -> Astor won at $0. Astor holds 2 Blue + 1 Orange + 1 Wild Share. Market refilled with stock-29.
T10 free action: Astor claimed goal-72 (2 Blue + 2 Orange, Wild Share as 2nd Orange), reward Gain $12 (cash 22->34). Wild Share discarded. Goals in play: 3.
T10 Astor die roll: 2 -> nothing.

T11 Getty: auctioned stock-22 Yellow Tip-Off at initial $6. Bidding: Morgan passed, Astor passed -> Getty won at $6 (cash 24->18). Yellow +1 to 3. Market refilled with action-46. (Tip-Off color choice + goal-66 pending.)
T11 Getty: won Yellow Tip-Off -> Tip-Off raised Blue +1 to 5.
T11 free action: Getty claimed goal-66 (2 Yellow), reward set Yellow to $10. Goals in play: 2 (next claim ends game).
T11 Getty die roll: 2 -> nothing.
T12 Morgan: SOLD stock-8 Blue Informant for $5 (cash 28->33). Blue 5->4. Informant peek: Morgan saw itip-56 (Blue +4). Morgan now holds 0 stocks.
T12 Morgan die roll: 3 -> nothing.
T13 Astor: auctioned action-46 Inside Track at initial $3. Bidding: Getty passed, Morgan passed -> Astor won at $3 (cash 34->31). Inside Track added to Astor hand. Market refilled with stock-27.
T13 Astor die roll: 6 -> all stocks +1.

T14 Getty: auctioned stock-33 Wild Share at initial $1. Bidding: Morgan $2, Astor passed, Getty passed -> Morgan won at $2 (cash 33->31), denying Getty the goal-70 winning line. Market refilled with action-40.
T14 Getty die roll: 3 -> nothing.

T15 Morgan: auctioned action-40 The Squeeze at initial $1. Bidding: Astor $4, Getty passed, Morgan passed -> Astor won at $4 (cash 31->27). The Squeeze added to Astor hand. Market refilled with stock-12.
T15 Morgan die roll: 1 -> flipped itip-56 (Blue +4). Tips left: 1.

T16 Astor: auctioned stock-29 Purple Boom at initial $0. Bidding: Getty passed, Morgan passed -> Astor won at $0. Purple +2 (Boom) to 7. Astor holds 2 Blue + 1 Orange + 1 Purple. Market refilled with action-39.
T16 Astor die roll: 2 -> nothing.

T17 Getty: auctioned stock-12 Orange blank at initial $8. Bidding: Morgan passed, Astor $10, Getty passed -> Astor won at $10 (cash 27->17). Orange +1 to 8. Astor holds 2 Blue + 2 Orange + 1 Purple. Market refilled with stock-14.
T17 Getty die roll: 5 -> nothing.

T18 Morgan: auctioned action-39 Pump and Dump at initial $5. Bidding: Astor passed, Getty $6, Morgan passed -> Getty won at $6 (cash 18->12). Pump and Dump added to Getty hand. Market refilled with stock-20.
T18 Morgan die roll: 2 -> nothing.

T19 Astor: auctioned stock-27 Purple blank at initial $1. Bidding: Getty passed, Morgan passed -> Astor won at $1 (cash 17->16). Purple +1 to 8. Astor holds 2 Blue + 2 Orange + 2 Purple. Market refilled with stock-31.
T19 free action: Astor claimed goal-76 (2 Orange + 2 Purple). Reward draw-3-keep-1: drew action-44, action-42, action-45, kept action-44. Goals in play: 1 -> GAME ENDS.
GAME OVER (T19). Final prices Blue $9, Orange $8, Yellow $11, Purple $8.
Final #1: Astor $66 (cash $16 + stocks $50, 3 goals).
Final #2: Getty $34 (cash $12 + stocks $22, 1 goals).
Final #3: Morgan $31 (cash $31 + stocks $0, 0 goals).
WINNER: Astor with $66.
